Title: Hotondo torihada! Bisenshi Zâbon no akuma no henshin
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Zarbon reveals his ferocious transformation to Vegeta; Kuririn and Dende continue their journey to the eldest Namekkuseijin; Son Goku trains under 50 times normal gravity; Tenshinhan, Yamucha, and Chaozu train as Piccolo meditates.
